title: Fresh Animations: Emissive labPBR
body:
![FA: Emissive labPBR logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55ce50ea4d269ba913d038d22047e06f25a99357.png)
-----------

This pack make [Fresh Animations: Emissive](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-emissive) works with labPBR, which will make emissive working with every shader supporting labPBR format.

You have to place it above [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) in the resource pack list. Or above [Bare Bones x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-fresh-animations) if you're using Bare Bones (like the screenshots)

It works fine with the default Minecraft resource pack, or any other packs !

-----------

A Bare Bones version is available [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-fresh-animations-emissive) (when not using shaders)

If you are using [Bare Bones PBR x128](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-pbr-x128) I recommend using [Bare Bones PBR x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-pbr-x-fresh-animations)
